name: Gold & Metals Depot
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Riverview, FL specializing in gold, silver jewelry, and collectibles with fair pricing and knowledgeable staff.
description_long:
Gold & Metals Depot is a family-owned pawn shop located at 7857 US-301 in Riverview, Florida, operating within Hillsborough County. The business positions itself as a premier destination for customers seeking trustworthy pawn shop services with personalized attention in a community-focused environment.

The shop specializes in buying, selling, and trading valuable items including gold and silver jewelry, collectibles, and precious metals. They offer appraisal services, fair pricing on items, and transparent negotiations. The store maintains a diverse inventory designed to appeal to both serious collectors and casual browsers. Services include jewelry restoration and metal trading for customers seeking to buy or sell valuables.

Gold & Metals Depot distinguishes itself through staff expertise, particularly noting team members Jacob and Freddy as knowledgeable assistants. The business emphasizes a clean, well-organized store environment with wheelchair-accessible facilities. They accept multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments. The company prioritizes customer service and transparency in explaining item values and pricing.

While the website content is largely promotional and generated from aggregated reviews rather than verified customer testimonials, the business has not yet completed owner verification on the platform. The site notes that some patrons perceive limited inventory compared to larger competitors, though the personalized service is valued. Operating hours are Monday-Friday 9 AM-5 PM and Saturday 10 AM-4 PM, with Sunday closures.
pros: Staff expertise with knowledgeable team members who explain item values clearly
Fair pricing and transparent negotiation process appreciated by customers
Clean, inviting, well-organized store layout making browsing easy
Multiple payment options including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments
Family-owned business with emphasis on community and local support
Diverse inventory of gold, silver jewelry, and collectibles
cons: Business has not completed owner verification on the Wheree platform
No verified customer reviews currently posted despite promotional content
Inventory reportedly more limited compared to larger competitor pawn shops
Website content appears AI-generated from aggregated sources rather than original business information
Phone number format appears unusual (+181-374-10111) and may warrant verification
best_for: Customers looking to sell or pawn gold and silver jewelry locally
Collectors seeking unique precious metals and valuable items
Individuals needing fair appraisals and transparent pricing on valuables
Community members preferring family-owned local businesses over large chains
diagnosis: Gold & Metals Depot is best for Riverview-area residents and visitors seeking to buy, sell, or pawn gold jewelry and precious metal collectibles with personalized service from knowledgeable staff. The main caveat is that this business lacks verified customer reviews and owner verification on the platform, making it difficult to independently validate the promotional claims about service quality and fair pricing.
services: Gold and silver jewelry buying and selling
Item negotiation and fair pricing consultation
